productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Cushioning Running White Black Yellow Shoe
description: CompositionWhite, black and yellow reflective running shoes with Synthetic leather and mesh uppers, GEL® Cushioning System, Compression molded EVAWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightFittingRegularMade for casual everyday wear, these athletic inspired shoes from asics are great for everyday wear when you have to be on your feet for long stretches of time. The synthetic leather and mesh uppers give snug Fit with breathability, The GEL® Cushioning System provides superior shock attentuation on impact with the ground and the lightweight EVA midsole makes the shoe lightweight. The outsole with the diagonal interweaving pattern provides reasonable grip.
